message:
fix: route printable keystrokes to filter input when palette is focused

When the palette search input is focused, printable characters (runes
and space) now go directly to the text input instead of being consumed
by global keybindings like 'q' (quit) and 'g' (home). Non-printable
keys (ctrl combos, arrows, esc, enter) still fall through to shortcuts.
(closes #95)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
